"'''Bug One'''" was the designation [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Alliance]] [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Nek Bwua'tu]] gave to the [[nest ship]] which belonged to the [[Gorog|Dark Nest]] during the [[Battle of the Murgo Choke]] in [[36 ABY]].

==History==
The ship was built at the [[Tusken's Eye]] by the [[Killik/Legends|Killik]] [[The Colony|Colony]] which was under the influence of the Dark Nest. With the help of [[Jae Juun]] and [[Tarfang]], [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] and [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]] infiltrated the ship just as it jumped from the Eye to [[Battle of the Murgo Choke|engage]] the Alliance [[Blockade of the Utegetu Nebula|blockade]] at [[Murgo Choke]].

As Skywalker and his team struggled to knock out the ship's [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]] by themselves, [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]] was able to determine the ship's owner with [[The Force/Legends|the Force]], who informed Bwua'tu aboard the [[Admiral Ackbar (Victory-class)|''Admiral Ackbar'']]. Alliance forces then began hammering Bug One until Leia found out her brother and husband were aboard.

With the backup from [[Mara Jade Skywalker]] in her [[StealthX]], Skywalker dueled with [[Lomi Plo]] and destroyed numerous Killik warriors. Bug One's hyperdrive was damaged by Mara's [[Jedi shadow bomb]] and was forced to remain in the [[Utegetu Nebula/Legends|Utegetu Nebula]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Dark Nest II: The Unseen Queen]]'' {{1st}}
